claim_bullets.bullet_text: Kestrel combinator creates constant functions; demonstrates use of K to bind values to names (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.177-197)
Illustrates caching of images and use of a ternary operator for base-case termination (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.177-197)
Discusses composing and decomposing data via functions, arrays, and objects (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.177-197)
Shows extensive use of ternary operator and arrays/objects for data structures, hinting at possible simplification (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.177-197)
Reiterates theme of composing and decomposing data, suggesting modular function design (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.177-197)

source_record_text: Chapter on building data structures using pure functions, focusing on combinatory logic and list representation.
